items.title: Harshit Rana ruled of England ODIs; Bishnoi replaces Chakravarthy for ZIM T20Is
items.summary: Fast bowler Prince Yadav has replaced Harshit Rana in India's squad for the ODI series against England. Harshit has been ruled out with a hamstring injury.
